stemHtml: A captain plans to go SCUBA diving whilst on a layover. Is there anything they should consider with regards to their flying duties on the return flight?

options.a: No. As passenger aircraft are pressurised, the pilot can conduct a flight immediately after diving.
options.b: Yes, the pilot should only perform one dive to avoid compression sickness during flight.
options.c: Yes, the pilot must wait at least 24 hours between diving and flying.
options.d: Yes. If a flight must be made within 24 hours of a dive, oxygen-enriched air must be used whilst diving, and a flight can then be made after only 6 hours.
